items.name: OpportunityRollupPlugin
items.businessLogic: On opportunity product create/update/delete, recalculates opportunity estimatedvalue and line rollups, honoring ispriceoverridden.

items.name: QuoteToOrderGuardPlugin
items.businessLogic: On quote activation/win and on order creation, blocks conversion to salesorder if an open con_dealdeskreview exists for the parent opportunity.

items.name: DealDeskApprovalStampPlugin
items.businessLogic: On con_dealdeskreview status change to Approved, stamps con_approvedon and the approving user, and writes back the approved discount to the opportunity.

items.name: Con.CaseRouting.EntitlementBinderPlugin
items.businessLogic: On case create, matches the customer to an active entitlement/SLA, decrements remaining terms, and stamps con_channelsource-derived defaults. Prevents case creation when no valid entitlement exists for Platinum customers.

items.name: Con.Escalation.SlaBreachStampPlugin
items.businessLogic: On escalation create, evaluates the linked case's active SLA KPI instances and sets con_slabreached; writes back to the case and rolls up breach counts for reporting.

items.name: Con.Deflection.SavingsCalculatorPlugin
items.businessLogic: On case deflection create, computes con_estimatedsavings from average handle time and tier labor cost, and links back to the knowledge article that deflected the case.

items.name: Contoso.FieldService.WorkOrderPricingPlugin
items.businessLogic: On work order product/service create or update, recalculates msdyn_totalamount rollups and applies agreement-based discounting from the linked price list.

items.name: Contoso.FieldService.SlaBreachEvaluatorPlugin
items.businessLogic: On work order update, evaluates elapsed time against the agreement's con_slapenaltyrule response hours and sets con_slabreachrisk accordingly.

items.name: Contoso.FieldService.InventoryDecrementPlugin
items.businessLogic: On work order product line status moving to Used, decrements msdyn_productinventory available quantity at the technician's truck warehouse.

items.name: Contoso.FieldService.SafetyInspectionGuardPlugin
items.businessLogic: On booking create for a hazardous work order, blocks the operation (throws InvalidPluginExecutionException) unless a con_safetyinspection with con_result = Pass or Pass with Conditions and con_signedoff = true exists for the work order.

items.name: ProjectRollupPlugin
items.businessLogic: On task or actuals change, recalculates project-level effort completed, scheduled finish, and cost/sales rollups; guards against recursion via depth check.

items.name: TimeEntryValidationPlugin
items.businessLogic: Pre-operation validation preventing time entries against closed projects or outside the assignment date range, and enforcing Contoso overtime policy.

items.name: ContractLineActualsGenerationPlugin
items.businessLogic: Generates unbilled actuals records from confirmed project journal lines and associates them to the correct contract line detail for invoicing.

items.name: ProjectHealthReviewAuditPlugin
items.businessLogic: Post-operation plugin that stamps con_projecthealthreview onto the parent project's latest-review fields and notifies the delivery lead when RAG is Red.

items.name: ContosoBrandApprovalGuardPlugin
items.businessLogic: Synchronous pre-operation plugin that prevents setting con_brandapprovalstatus to Approved on a marketing email unless a legal footer template is assigned and its region matches the journey's data residency region.

items.name: ContosoBudgetRollupPlugin
items.businessLogic: Post-operation plugin that recalculates committed vs requested budget on con_campaignbrief by aggregating related F&O virtual spend lines whenever a spend line is associated.

items.name: ContosoConsentAuditPlugin
items.businessLogic: Post-operation plugin that writes an immutable audit entry and updates con_marketablereason on the related contact whenever consent status changes.

items.name: ConsentLedgerValidationPlugin
items.businessLogic: Pre-operation validation on the consent ledger: ensures every DSR request references a valid unified profile and blocks duplicate open DSR requests of the same type for a profile.

items.name: MatchRuleAuditPlugin
items.businessLogic: Post-operation plugin that auto-increments con_version and writes an audit trail whenever a match-rule override changes, and prevents deletion of mandatory rules referenced by an active unification.

items.name: ProfileMergeEnrichmentPlugin
items.businessLogic: Post-create plugin on unified profiles that triggers semantic enrichment lookups and links matched account/contact records, populating con_matchedaccountid/con_matchedcontactid.

items.name: ApApprovalRoutingPlugin
items.businessLogic: On create/update of con_apapprovalrequest, computes the required con_approvaltier from con_amount against Contoso threshold config and assigns con_approverid from the approval hierarchy.

items.name: CreditLimitEnforcementPlugin
items.businessLogic: Pre-operation plugin on account update that recalculates con_creditriskrating and blocks payment-terms changes when open AR exceeds creditlimit.

items.name: CapexToFixedAssetPlugin
items.businessLogic: On con_capexrequest status = Approved, provisions a fixed-asset acquisition payload and links the resulting F&O mserp_fixedasset reference back to the request.

items.name: RequisitionNumberPlugin
items.businessLogic: Generates a sequential con_name requisition number (REQ-{yyyy}-{seq}) on create and validates con_estimatedamount against the requester's spend limit.

items.name: ShipmentTrackingSyncPlugin
items.businessLogic: On shipment create/update, validates carrier tracking number format and rolls up shipment status to the linked F&O sales order line via the OData connection.

items.name: VendorApprovalGuardPlugin
items.businessLogic: Prevents deletion of an approved vendor that is referenced by open requisitions and defaults con_vendoraccount from the linked account number.

items.name: RetailTransactionTotalsPlugin
items.businessLogic: On create/update of a sales or payment line, recalculates the parent transaction's msdyn_totalamount and msdyn_grosstotal and flags over-tendered transactions.

items.name: LoyaltyCardEnrollmentPlugin
items.businessLogic: On create of a loyalty card, validates uniqueness of the card number, stamps the enrollment channel, and initializes the points balance from the program's welcome bonus.

items.name: GiftCardRedemptionPlugin
items.businessLogic: On update of a gift card during tender application, decrements the gift card balance atomically and rejects redemption if funds are insufficient.

items.name: WorkerEmployeeIdPlugin
items.businessLogic: Auto-generates a sequential con_employeeid on worker creation and validates uniqueness of personal email within the legal entity.

items.name: LeaveBalanceValidationPlugin
items.businessLogic: Pre-validation plugin that blocks a leave request when con_totaldays exceeds the worker's accrued balance on the matching mshr_leaveenrollment record.

items.name: PositionHierarchyGuardPlugin
items.businessLogic: Prevents circular reporting relationships when cdm_reportstoposition is set and cascades department changes to child positions.

items.name: DisciplinaryCaseAuditPlugin
items.businessLogic: Writes an immutable audit entry and enforces confidential access checks whenever a disciplinary case is created or its owner is reassigned.

items.name: ConversationRoutingPlugin
items.businessLogic: On conversation create, evaluates con_priorityscore from context and work-stream routing rules, then stamps the target queue before assignment.

items.name: SessionParticipantAuditPlugin
items.businessLogic: On participant creation, records active start time and validates consult/transfer mode transitions for coaching-note eligibility.

items.name: DeflectionCostCalculationPlugin
items.businessLogic: On deflection outcome create, computes con_costavoided using the channel cost model and marks con_contained based on outcome type.

items.name: Con.Governance.DataSensitivityGuardPlugin
items.businessLogic: Pre-Operation validation preventing a con_datasensitivity downgrade (e.g. Regulated -> Public) on account/contact unless the executing user holds the CoE Data Protection Officer role; throws InvalidPluginExecutionException otherwise.

items.name: Con.Governance.EnvironmentInventoryAuditPlugin
items.businessLogic: Post-Operation plug-in that writes an immutable audit annotation and enforces uniqueness of con_environmentid whenever an environment inventory record is created or modified.

items.name: Con.Governance.AttestationRollupPlugin
items.businessLogic: Post-Operation plug-in that recalculates the parent environment's compliance score and next-due date when a con_coecomplianceattestation is created or its con_result changes.
